channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Lighthearted Moment at White House Briefing Coincides with Positive Policy Announcement
Democrats Reported to Be Planning Impeachment Strategy If They Retake the House
Internal Divisions at Southern Poverty Law Center Led to Leadership Collapse
item.description: The Justice Department has accused the SPLC of paying informants to infiltrate extremist groups, compounding years of internal turmoil at the civil rights organization.

item.title: Federal Appeals Court Blocks Trump Executive Order Suspending Asylum Access
item.description: An appeals court blocked President Trump's executive order suspending asylum access, halting a central component of his administration's immigration enforcement strategy.

item.title: Federal Indictment Identifies Individuals SPLC Allegedly Paid as Covert Informants
item.description: A federal indictment alleges the Southern Poverty Law Center used donor funds to secretly compensate informants with ties to white supremacist and extremist organizations.
